notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien grid, shields, UFO, waves, and audio; minor visual fidelity issues with simplified alien sprites lacking classic pixel-art detail, but core mechanics and controls work well.
An excellent, feature-complete implementation with great mechanics, scaling difficulty, and satisfying shield degradation, though the alien sprites are somewhat basic.
A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone, but simplified visuals, non-classic behaviors, and a few rough edges keep it well short of benchmark-perfect.
